content_body: We came to Blue Ridge to celebrate my husband's birthday, celebrate the arrival of Fall, fish, and relax. What a wonderful time we had here. We had perfect fall weather. We rode the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway, toured downtown Blue Ridge in a horse-drawn carriage, we rode horses at Adventure Trail Rides, ate at the Victorian House, went to Merciers Orchard, and bubbled our cares away in the hot tub. Our kids loved all of the activities we did - they're 7 and 4 years old. They most especially loved the train ride! Our favorite moments included standing with one foot in GA and the other in TN. We did this during the Train ride when it stopped in McCaysville. Overall, we really enjoyed this beautiful home. We all felt very comfortable here. It was so great, and we are planning to return! GA
title: Birthday Celebration In North Georgia
